error_signature: The connection was aborted, perhaps the server is offline
title: HTTP Node connection aborted due to conflicting n8n instances
symptom: When trying to make an HTTP request from n8n to another container, the request fails with 'The connection was aborted, perhaps the server is offline'.
applies_when: Using HTTP node to connect to another Docker container
not_this_if: Only one n8n instance is running
root_cause: The error occurs because there are multiple instances of n8n running, which can lead to port conflicts and communication issues between containers. In this case, a hidden instance of n8n was running in WSL, causing the HTTP requests to fail.
fix_steps: Identify all running n8n instances using 'docker ps' or similar commands
Ensure only one n8n instance is running
Retry the HTTP request from the n8n node
agent_instruction: Check for and stop any conflicting n8n instances before retrying the HTTP request.
